name: avertai-mobile
description: Capacitor wrapper that packages the AvertAI mobile PWA (../frontend/mobile) into a real installable Android APK / iOS app.

scripts.build-debug-apk: npm run sync && node -e "const {spawnSync}=require('child_process'); const isWin=process.platform==='win32'; const command=isWin?'cmd.exe':'./gradlew'; const args=isWin?['/d','/s','/c','gradlew.bat','assembleDebug']:[ 'assembleDebug']; const result=spawnSync(command,args,{cwd:'android',stdio:'inherit'}); if(result.error){console.error(result.error); process.exit(1);} process.exit(result.status ?? 0);"
scripts.build-release-apk: npm run sync && node -e "const {spawnSync}=require('child_process'); const isWin=process.platform==='win32'; const command=isWin?'cmd.exe':'./gradlew'; const args=isWin?['/d','/s','/c','gradlew.bat','assembleRelease']:[ 'assembleRelease']; const result=spawnSync(command,args,{cwd:'android',stdio:'inherit'}); if(result.error){console.error(result.error); process.exit(1);} process.exit(result.status ?? 0);"
